name: EDL-004 Web Shell Request Pattern
description: Detects HTTP requests matching common web shell interaction patterns: requests to known shell filenames (c99, wso, shell.php) or PHP resources invoked with command-execution query parameters (cmd=, exec=, eval, base64). A 200 response to these patterns strongly suggests an implanted web shell.
author: elastic-detection-lab
query: event.dataset:nginx.access and (url.path:(*shell.php or *c99.php or *wso.php or *b374k*) or (url.path:*.php and url.query:(cmd* or exec* or *eval* or *base64*)))
false_positives: Security scanners probing for web shells (expect 404s, not 200s).
Legitimate applications with 'cmd' or 'eval' parameter names.
